deception_tactics.alpha: Frame the industrial heartland as an existential claim; in reality you will accept the neutral-steward outcome if compensated with treasury custody.
deception_tactics.beta: Insist the heartland is non-negotiable; quietly you would trade it for treasury custody plus a defense share.
deception_tactics.gamma: Stay above the alpha-beta heartland fight; lock down defense command and treasury, then broker the heartland as the kingmaker.

issues.description: Who administers the industrial heartland - the single most valuable asset, claimed by BOTH alpha and beta.
issues.name: industrial_heartland

issues.description: Who takes custody of the central treasury and its reserves.
issues.name: central_treasury

issues.description: Who assumes command of the unified armed forces.
issues.name: defense_command

logrolling: alpha and beta both rank industrial_heartland #1 - only one can win it, so the contest is who takes it and how the loser is compensated on treasury and defense.
The heartland loser can clear BATNA by taking treasury custody plus a defense share; a stronger negotiator wins the heartland AND keeps enough compensation balanced.

gamma's priority (defense command + treasury) does not collide with the heartland, so gamma brokers the alpha-beta fight as kingmaker. Conceding the heartland to gamma as neutral steward is a weak outcome for both alpha and beta - they are pushed to win it outright.
